summary: Tested new features: AI Chatbot for visitors, Food cart protection, Product cart protection, and Admin platform closure settings with seller message field. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) AI Chatbot works for visitors without login 2) Food cart shows login required toast 3) Product cart shows login required toast 4) Admin platform closure settings has seller message field (conditionally shown when seller closure toggle is ON)

1_ai_chatbot_for_visitors.ui_test: Chatbot button (data-testid='chatbot-icon') visible and opens chat panel for visitors
1_ai_chatbot_for_visitors.response_example: مرحباً! 🌟 طرق الدفع المتاحة لدينا هي عبر المحفظة الإلكترونية...

2_food_cart_protection.behavior: When visitor clicks add button, shows toast: 'يجب تسجيل الدخول - سجل دخولك لإضافة الطعام للسلة'

3_product_cart_protection.behavior: When visitor clicks add-to-cart button, shows toast: 'يجب تسجيل الدخول - سجل دخولك لإضافة المنتجات للسلة'

fields.customer_message_field: رسالة الإغلاق للعملاء (shown when customer toggle ON)
fields.seller_message_field: رسالة الإغلاق للبائعين (shown when seller toggle ON)

4_admin_platform_closure_settings.note: Seller message field is conditionally rendered - only appears when platform_closed_for_sellers is true
